title: Luffy Runs Out of Time — Part 3
description: Luffy’s Gear Fourth backlash leaves him vulnerable while the Birdcage keeps closing.
scene: On pages 12–16, Luffy, Doflamingo, King Riku, Dressrosa Citizens, Trafalgar Law move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And it is no tragedy that only began today...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We have all, for the past 10 years, been confined...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: to the birdcage known as dressrossa! A birdcage built by the pirate that now rules dressrossa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: For ten years, we have lived as dolls being toyed with by their puppeter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Someone knows I'd

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yet this, too, is soon to pass.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: the DonquiJote family that we all thought none could hope to match up to is now,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Thanks to the efforts of the stalwart warriors that by mere chance happened to be in this country,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: mere inches from total defeat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The exe- cutives of the family have all already been defeated!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The only foe remaining before us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: is none other than the current King of Dressrossa, Donquijote DoFlamingo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And the one who stands against him is Straw Hat Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: He is surely the man that shall deliver us from this bird cage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: whether he wins or loses, it shall all be decided in a matter of minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: that is why, whatever it takes, you must continue to run!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: None shall meet their end crushed under the bars of the prison that holds us!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: You must run on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Even if you cannot draw breath, even if your legs break...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Just a few minutes more...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: We yet have hope!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Do not dare give up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Okay...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: It's time to run!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: GRAND- Daughter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Yes,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Grand- Ma!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: to the Central Districts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You heard King Riku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Carry the Wounded!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Live on till this is all over!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Death would be so much easier for you !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: BILLOW WHITE!*

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: WAAH! The entire city has become threads!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I don't have any time left!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Outta my way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: This ends now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No

summary: This part focuses on luffy runs out of time, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
